generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for capturing 3D point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i Depth Camera for capturing RGB-D images"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraImageDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoLiDARDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via UDP over Wi-Fi"
]

instance DepthCameraImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    base:desc "Raw depth camera image data transmitted via UDP over Wi-Fi"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth camera image data from Intel RealSense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracking information from LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance StandardizedLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Standardized LiDAR point cloud data after translation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model for vehicle speed regulation and lead vehicle detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Acquires sensor input data for processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes all data streams, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs point cloud clustering and object tracking for LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations to cloud resources for resource-constrained ECUs"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Generates diagnostic reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Stores structured data in SQL database for persistence"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance ActuationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into precise motor voltage signals via PWM"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, projected driving path, and detected object tracks with data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight, DrivingPathVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Cloud-based computation offloading for ACC system functions including lead vehicle detection and speed calculation"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC functions including enabling/disabling, speed setting, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creates diagnostic output reports for system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides DiagnosticReportInsight
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-interpretable visualization of vehicle speed, position, and status"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected object tracks from LiDAR data"
]

instance DrivingPathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path for ACC system"
]

instance DiagnosticReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable diagnostic report for system troubleshooting"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables the Adaptive Cruise Control system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disables the Adaptive Cruise Control system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets the desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers emergency braking command for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for regulating motor speed via PWM"
]

instance DCMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "DC motor for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for directional control"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time data display"
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel for remote management commands"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity hosting automotive functionality and sensor data processing"
    base:contains HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, DCMotor, SteeringServo
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity handling data processing and model execution"
    base:contains DataCollectionEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler, ACCModel, DataStorageEnabler, ReportGenerationEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler, PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User entity for monitoring and control interfaces"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., ACC, steering, motor actuation) are processed by the Controlling FE and Data Translation component, which serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions. Commands are communicated via ROS2 within the Digital Twin and UDP over Wi-Fi between entities to the Actuation FE for physical actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy between physical and digital components for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by industry standards with hardware limitations necessitating this specific timeframe."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architected per ISO 23247 RA, software components are mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each entity (Physical, Digital, User) is deployed on dedicated hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity extending beyond the standard's OME to handle general automotive functionality. System-wide coordination relies on 100 ms time synchronization accuracy for computation offloading, and the User Interface FE is subdivided into 3D Visualization and Control Panel components within the User Entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is utilized across multiple lifecycle stages, including the design phase of automotive systems, during vehicle operation for real-time monitoring, and as a product lifecycle management tool to track and optimize the entire product lifecycle from development to end-of-life."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DTS maintains a maximum network latency of 100 ms from the vehicle to the DT Entity. Communication protocols include ROS2 for intra-entity software components and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication. Each entity is deployed on separate hardware components, as shown in the Architecture and deployment view (Fig. 2)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Data storage is external to the vehicle per Requirement R3, with computational tasks offloaded to cloud infrastructure as specified in Section III.A. Each entity is deployed on dedicated hardware components, supporting scalable cloud-based deployment models."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard for Digital Twin framework in manufacturing, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which defines an entity-based structure including Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) handle specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) cited as an example implementation for interoperability."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system complies with ISO 15622:2018 performance requirements for Adaptive Cruise Control systems and adheres to the latency specifications defined in 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2X services to ensure safety-critical operations through timely data exchange."
]
